message:
Create empty issues.jsonl on init for bv compatibility

- Write empty issues.jsonl during br init for beads_viewer (bv) compat
- bv expects this file to exist even with no issues
- Add jsonl_existed tracking to init steps
- Update lint command to handle new init behavior
- Add model helpers for empty state detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
